text:
Alright, so here's my current setup:

Codex with GPT 5.5 with extra high reasoning. 
Opus 4.7 with extra high reasoning through Cursor (don't trust claude code harness atm).

GPT 5.5 producing about 8-13% better code quality, 8-12% less bugs, and 27% more thoroughness on
